meta.title: Monospecific antibody to the haemagglutinin of measles virus -- McFarlin et al. 48 (2): 425 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: A hybrid between a murine myeloma cell line and spleen cells from a mouse immunized with measles has been produced. Two stable clones produce antibody with identical immunochemical and biological properties. This antibody reacts with the 76,000 mol. wt. protein present in the lysates and on the surface of cells persistently infected with measles. It exhibits HAI and neutralizing activity.
